name: Super K Food Mart
content: There were a surprisingly large number of fluid dynamics scientists in business casual frequenting the Super K throughout the research conference. It partially makes sense; I would want to drink my sorrows away as well if I studied fluid dynamics, but at the same time, liquor is also a fluid and I feel like that would just make me think about fluid mechanics again. Thankfully, I can bill my research as “not really fluid mechanics” and “more of a computer vision thing,” so I only attended the visits to Super K as emotional support.
